title: Tamil Nadu’s rights of utmost importance, never said will surrender them: Higher Education Minister
content: He was responding to a controversy stoked by his statement in Madurai on Wednesday that the new government need not follow the policies of the previous government, particularly with regard to the Chief Minister serving as the Chancellor of universities

title: Telangana CM moots unified card to extend benefits of welfare schemes
content: Telangana CM directs officials to utilise artificial intelligence to profile individual details so that the card would contain the health information pertaining to all

title: Forest officials, volunteers to disperse 50 lakh seed balls in north Andhra Pradesh
content: Forest officials and volunteers plan to disperse 50 lakh seed balls of native, drought-resistant trees across north Andhra Pradesh under Harita Samaram

title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah resigns, but won’t budge from State politics
content: Going down memory lane, he said he was an ‘accidental politician’, with none in the family being in politics

title: WFI moves Supreme Court against HC order allowing Vinesh Phogat to participate in Asian Games selection trials
content: Wrestling Federation of India argues that the Delhi HC’s decision allowing grappler Vinesh Phogat to participate in the selection trials for the Asian Games 2026 undermines its selection framework

title: Fishermen seek infrastructure, training to revive tuna fishing harbour in Tiruvottiyur
content: If the tuna fishing harbour constructed at a cost of ₹200 crore at Tiruvottiyur Kuppam is to be put to use, fishermen must have the skills to catch quality tuna suitable for export, said M.D. Dayalan of the Indian Fishermen Association

title: Om Birla releases 89 'historical' volumes of Central Legislative Assembly proceedings
content: Om Birla remarked that this historical document will inspire all individuals who believe in democracy, as well as public representatives throughout the country

title: Supreme Court stays its order till July 22 to seal structures within 100-metre prohibited zone at Delhi Golf Club
content: With regard to nine other monuments in the club, the apex court said there shall be no activity permitted within 20 metres radius of those buildings. This direction was also kept in abeyance by the court

title: Suspected Ebola patient in Gujarat tests negative; State govt. ‘fully alert’
content: The businessman had arrived in Mumbai from Congo about five to seven days ago and later travelled to Vadodara

title: Karnataka politics LIVE: I will continue in active politics, fight communal forces until my last breath: Siddaramaiah
content: Earlier, the AHINDA leader submitted his resignation from the Chief Minister's post to Governor's Special Secretary Prabhushankar

title: AIADMK remains united, will bring back party rule in Tamil Nadu: S.P. Velumani
content: Speaking to the media in Coimbatore, he said the party is his breath and that the party’s general secretary is Edappadi K. Palaniswami

title: Visakhapatnam Collector seeks parties’ cooperation for SIR of electoral roll
content: District Collector M. Abhishikt Kishor asks political parties to help with the SIR of electoral rolls, the first in 23 years, as the draft roll is due on July 21 and the final on September 22

title: D.K. Shivakumar: Congress troubleshooter poised to become Chief Minister of Karnataka
content: D.K. Shivakumar’s proximity to the party’s top brass, particularly Sonia Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, is believed to have strengthened his claim after a prolonged power struggle with Chief Minister Siddaramaiah over the last three years

title: Chinna Bompalle tank gets water after 20 years on feeder channel works
content: District Collector A. Siri says water has reached the Chinna Bompalle tank in Kosigi mandal for the first time in 20 years, after feeder channel works under the Jaladhara Jalaharathi scheme

title: Key KCP commander arrested in Delhi; large cache of arms, ammo seized in Manipur
content: Haobijam, believed to be a key member of the proscribed outfit, was wanted in more than a dozen cases registered under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA)

title: Regional parties' income falls 52% in 2024-25; 21 spent more than they earned: ADR report
content: Among regional parties, the highest income was declared by the Telugu Desam Party (TDP) at ₹228.31 crore, constituting 19.14% of the total income, followed closely by the All India Trinamool Congress (AITC) and the YSR Congress

title: India, Korea agree to address India’s growing bilateral trade deficit in latest round of negotiations
content: India and South Korea are currently negotiating the upgrade of the India-Korea Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement which came into force in 2010.

title: Resolve water disputes through cooperation, says PM Modi to States
content: The Prime Minister also emphasised that innovative use of canal networks should be explored, including installation of solar panels along canals and over canals for clean electricity generation

title: Kerala Police come under fire after attack on ED officials during raid at former CM Pinarayi Vijayan’s residence
content: Eight CPI(M), DYFI workers arrested thus far; Home Minister Ramesh Chennithala holds high-level meeting

title: Indian national living illegally in U.S. held by Federal authorities for 'assaulting man with baseball bat'
content: An Indian national accused of assaulting a man with a baseball bat in Massachusetts has been arrested by U.S. immigration authorities after local officials allegedly released him without notifying ICE

title: Jaishankar, Ukrainian FM discuss war, peace efforts amid evolving battlefield situation
content: India has consistently called for dialogue and diplomacy to resolve the Ukraine conflict while maintaining close relations with both Russia and Ukraine

title: Government readies contingency plans to counter El Nino threat to kharif season, says Agriculture Minister Shivraj Chouhan
content: Agriculture Secretary Atish Chandra also said crop diversification, agricultural self-reliance, and sustainability have become the govt's core priorities, urging States to align their plans accordingly

title: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announces decision to step down at breakfast meeting with Ministers
content: While sharing his decision to step down, the Chief Minister informed the Cabinet that he had been asked to do so by the Congress High Command

title: Rain brings brief relief to Visakhapatnam, but heat and humidity return
content: Overnight rain and strong winds cooled Visakhapatnam and brought down trees on city roads, but sunshine and 72% humidity made the afternoon sticky again

title: Severe heatwave in Rajasthan for next 48 hours, rain from May 29
content: Maximum temperatures in most parts of the State are expected to remain between 44 and 46° Celsius, while some areas in the Bikaner and Kota divisions and the Shekhawati region may record temperatures of 46-47° Celsius

title: From Andal to the Raman Effect, new book captures Srivilliputhur’s many legacies
content: The 168-page publication of The Hindu titled Srivilliputhur - Divine Realm of Andal, curated by Suganthy Krishnamachari, traces the religious, cultural, and historical significance of Srivilliputhur close to Madurai

title: Combing operations underway to trace those held hostage by armed groups: Manipur CM
content: The government is taking the issue seriously, and search and combing operations by security forces are underway to trace the hostages, the Chief Minister said

title: Watch: Cockroach Janta Party: lessons for the ruling party and Opposition
content: The online satirical phenomena the Cockroach Janta Party, has gained a lot of traction online and in political discourse. It has also become, in a sense, a lightning rod, of a narrative tug of war rather than what it is – a signal to political parties across the spectrum. We analyse how the BJP and the opposition parties have responded to this.

title: 8 arrested for attack on ED officials’ vehicle after raid at ex-Kerala CM Pinarayi’s residence
content: State Police Chief Ravada A. Chandrasekhar says investigation is on the right track and that more people involved in the violence have been identified

title: Poultry farmers in Namakkal deny claims of long-term egg storage for noon meal scheme
content: In a social media post, former BJP State president K. Annamalai alleged that contractors had procured nearly 20 crore eggs when prices dropped to ₹3.70 apiece in March and stored them for long-term supply to schools

title: Naidu seeks Bharat Ratna for N.T. Rama Rao at Mahanadu
content: Paying tribute on N.T. Rama Rao’s birth anniversary, the Chief Minister says the TDP founder deserves the country’s highest civilian honour

title: BJP bets on Jat Sikh card with Dhillon’s appointment as Punjab chief
content: The saffron party has historically struggled to make inroads in Punjab, but has lately been aggressively building its campaign momentum to gain a foothold in the border State

title: Manoj Jarange Patil to begin indefinite hunger strike from May 30 over Maratha quota demands
content: Maratha reservation activist says protest in Jalna will continue without food, water or shelter; seeks implementation of Kunbi certificate assurances and extension to Sandeep Shinde panel

title: APSCHE invites nominations for Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar 2026
content: The higher education council asks institutions and the public to nominate talented children, particularly girls and those from weaker sections, by July 21 for the national awards

title: Visakhapatnam Collector sets June 30 deadline for Bhogapuram airport roads
content: Ahead of the Alluri Sitarama Raju International Airport’s opening in early July, Collector M. Abhishikth Kishore asks departments to finish road and connectivity works to the Bhogapuram airport by June 30

title: VCK in TVK-led government: Thirumavalavan calls upon cadre to ‘let go and move on’
content: “DMK leaders like A. Raja are criticising us. We are pained...but we understand their point of view as well. The DMK cadre will not be able to accept the VCK joining hands with the TVK, which has severely criticised the DMK,” stated Mr. Thirumavalavan.

title: Andhra Pradesh officials say Odisha blocking census collection in Kotia villages
content: Tribal Welfare Minister Gummadi Sandhya Rani has asked Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu to protect the people of the disputed Kotia villages, where Odisha officials have reportedly stopped Andhra Pradesh staff from collecting census data

title: Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan takes responsibility for CBSE OSM discrepancies, assures strict action against guilty
content: Pradhan hit at out at Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, saying he was “frustrated” and “opposed” to technological progress

title: Emotional scenes as Abdul Rahim arrives home in Kerala after serving 20-year jail term in Saudi
content: A native of Kodampuzha in Kozhikode district of Kerala, Abdul Rahim was imprisoned and sentenced to death in 2006 for the murder of 14-year-old differently abled son of his employer. His jail term ended on May 19

title: A journey of the heart: One Sri Lankan officer’s transformative train adventure through India
content: Forty days, some 13,000 kilometres, km, and 24 trains crisscrossing India — that sums up Saman Athaudahetti’s February and March, as he chased his long-held dream of exploring this neighbouring country through its railway network

title: Art in conflict zones: Nicky Chandam’s visual documentation of Manipur and the politics of performance
content: Manipur-based Nicky Chandam’s photography exhibition in Chennai takes viewers deep into the world of stage performances, where fleeting emotions unfold into many stories.

title: Jamiat chief says do not sacrifice prohibited animals, avoid sharing slaughter photos on social media
content: Former Vice-President Hamid Ansari also appealed to Muslims not to slaughter cows during Id Al-Adha and urged the Centre to heed the Jamiat chief's suggestion to declare the cow as the national animal

title: ‘Pages of history, no matter their colour, cannot be excised’ says Culture Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat
content: Both the abundance of historic temples and later era Islamic architectural marvels hold ‘equal importance’ for the Invilisation of India says Culture and Tourism Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat

title: Tussle for the top spot in Karnataka: A timeline
content: A mass leader with strong rural connect, Siddaramaiah’s second stint as CM of Karnataka was marked by controversies and internal dissidence.

title: Speculation over, Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announces decision to step down
content: While sharing his decision to step down, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah informed the Cabinet that he had been asked to do so by the Congress High Command.

title: TMC’s Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar accuses party MP Kalyan Banerjee of verbal abuse, misogyny
content: Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar’s letter says the misogyny has been against many lady members and needs to be punished

title: India, China hold 'constructive' talks on LAC; agree border peace key to normalising ties
content: The two sides also agreed to work together to make "substantive preparation" for the next meeting of the Special Representatives (SR) which is to be held in China

title: Telangana Transport Minister flags off 60 EV buses, says TGSRTC merger process will begin after union elections
content: Representatives of recognised unions and officials to begin TGSRTC merger process after elections for recognised unions

title: Tamil Nadu govt. to file curative petition against youngster’s acquittal from 2017 Mugalivakkam child sexual assault-cum-murder case
content: Justices G.R. Swaminathan and V. Lakshminarayanan close a writ petition after recording the submission

title: Velankanni-bound tourist bus overturns near Nellore, 16 injured
content: A private bus carrying 43 pilgrims to Velankanni hit a highway railing and overturned near Chintareddypalem; three of the injured are serious

title: Twisha death probe: CBI arrests mother-in-law Giribala Singh after HC scraps anticipatory bail
content: The CBI has taken Giribala Singh, mother-in-law of deceased Twisha Sharma, into custody after the Madhya Pradesh High Court quashed her anticipatory bail. The court cited insufficient appreciation of evidence, including witness statements and WhatsApp chats, and noted her alleged lack of cooperation with the investigation into dowry harassment and cruelty allegations.

title: Gujarat student stabbed to death in Canada; family informed after 12 days
content: A young Indian student, Vidhi, living in Canada for higher studies and aiming for permanent residency, was found murdered in the Niagara region. She was reportedly killed in a knife attack, with her family in Gujarat informed nearly 12 days later. Canadian authorities have launched a murder investigation.

title: ‘Change team’: Ex-India cricketer asks Yashasvi Jaiswal to leave Rajasthan Royals
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal, once seen as India's next batting star, faces inconsistent white-ball opportunities and is overshadowed by his IPL partner Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Former cricketer Ambati Rayudu suggests Jaiswal needs a team change, proposing Mumbai Indians as a logical destination for his development.

title: 'High command asked me': Karnataka's longest-serving CM Sidda resigns
content: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah has resigned, paving the way for Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar to take the top post. This transition follows months of speculation and high-level meetings in Delhi.  Photos showcasing unity between the leaders were shared, signaling an amicable power handover after the Congress high command's directive for a leadership change.

title: Zuckerberg to shareholders: Will take on Google, Amazon and Microsoft in Cloud business
content: Meta's CEO revealed plans to potentially enter the cloud computing market, leveraging massive AI infrastructure investments for excess capacity.  The company is significantly boosting AI spending, aiming to monetize unused compute power by renting it out.  This strategic move, alongside testing subscription plans for its AI services, signals Meta's ambition to tap into lucrative tech sectors.

title: Why Kolkata continues to rank as India’s safest city
content: Kolkata has once again been named India's safest metro city, maintaining its top ranking for the fifth consecutive year according to the NCRB 2024 report. Despite a recent disturbing incident, the city recorded the lowest rate of cognisable offences per lakh population, showcasing a long-term decline in crime.

title: Sooryavanshi's three-word post goes viral after his brutal knock against SRH
content: In a stunning display of talent, the young prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi showcased his prowess by scoring an electrifying 97 runs off just 29 balls. This performance almost set a new benchmark, falling just short of Chris Gayle's record for the fastest century in IPL history. With an astonishing 65 sixes this season, he has also eclipsed Gayle’s previous record.

title: Months after Dell CEO donated $6.25bn to Trump Accounts, firm gets $9.7bn Pentagon deal
content: Months after Michael and Susan Dell's $6.25 billion donation to seed children's "Trump accounts," Dell Technologies secured a $9.7 billion contract with the US Department of Defense for enterprise software. This five-year deal, aimed at consolidating licensing and saving millions annually, followed a competitive evaluation process.

title: India, Singapore discuss deeper strategic cooperation at 16th Defence Policy Dialogue
content: India and Singapore solidified their robust defence partnership during the 16th Defence Policy Dialogue in Singapore. Discussions focused on deepening cooperation in strategic areas, including emerging and digital warfare domains. The visit also explored collaboration opportunities in advanced digital and technical capabilities, reinforcing the strong bilateral ties guided by their Comprehensive Strategic Partnership.

title: AAP leader Jai Pal Singh Bau shot after parking dispute in Amritsar
content: Aam Aadmi Party's Ward No. 42 in-charge, Jai Pal Singh Bau, was shot in the leg following a heated argument with his neighbour over vehicle parking outside his Amritsar residence. He is stable and undergoing treatment at a private hospital. CCTV footage captured the escalating verbal dispute. Police are investigating the incident.

title: Rs 1L awarded to patient who underwent two kidney stone surgeries but got no relief
content: A Delhi surgeon and hospital have been held liable for medical negligence after a patient endured persistent kidney stone pain despite two surgeries. The consumer commission upheld the earlier order, directing them to pay compensation.  An expert opinion found it unlikely for such a large stone to reform so quickly, rejecting the hospital's defense.

title: JP Morgan responds to order to pay $4M to ex-employee fired over home business meeting
content: A Wall Street arbitration panel has ordered JP Morgan to pay former employee Ryan Bodner $4 million in damages, plus interest, for wrongful termination. Bodner was fired over an expense submission for a business meeting at his home, which the bank allegedly mischaracterized as a party. The panel also recommended expunging the reason for his termination from his record.

title: Sooryavanshi tipped to hit '100 sixes' in an IPL season after shattering Gayle's record
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has rewritten IPL history, smashing Chris Gayle's record for most sixes in a season with 65. His explosive 97 off 29 balls propelled Rajasthan Royals to Qualifier 2. Commentator Aakash Chopra lauded his power and maturity, predicting he could one day reach an astonishing 100 sixes in a single IPL season.

title: Setback for mango exports! Why Japan stopped imports of Kesar, Alphonso, Langra & more
content: During 2025-26, Gujarat’s Kesar mango emerged as the biggest contributor to India’s mango exports to Japan, accounting for shipments worth nearly $0.2 million out of the total $1.54 million earned from fresh and processed mango exports to the country.

title: Tendulkar explains Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s 'outstanding' batting aspect
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s sensational 97 off 29 balls against SRH in the IPL 2026 Eliminator earned praise from cricket legends worldwide. The 15-year-old RR batter smashed 12 sixes and broke Chris Gayle’s record for most sixes in an IPL season. Sachin Tendulkar, Yuvraj Singh, AB de Villiers, Michael Vaughan and others hailed the teenager’s fearless batting as Rajasthan Royals reached Qualifier 2.

title: Chef Pankaj Bhadouria reveals diagnosed with breast cancer; fans pray for recovery
content: Pankaj Bhadouria, the trailblazing winner of MasterChef India, has publicly announced her breast cancer diagnosis. In an emotional message shared across social platforms, she urged her devoted followers to keep her in their thoughts and prayers as she navigates this challenging chapter.

title: With RFP release, AMCA one step closer: How will it reshape India's combat prowess
content: The AMCA, India's state-of-the-art fifth-generation stealth fighter, is embarking on a pivotal phase of its development journey, marked by the release of a comprehensive Request For Proposal. Designed to bolster India's aerial prowess, this advanced fighter is poised to tackle pressing regional security issues while harnessing the power of stealth technology.

title: ‘Will never happen’: North Korea rejects Quad’s call for denuclearisation
content: North Korea has vehemently rejected the Quad's call for its denuclearisation, vowing "never" to give up its nuclear weapons. The foreign ministry accused the grouping of being a US tool and interfering in its affairs.  The Quad nations, including India, had reiterated their commitment to Pyongyang's denuclearisation and condemned its weapons programs.

title: Beyond combat capability, how AMCA will help India beat China in the long race
content: India's Advanced Medium Combat Aircraft (AMCA) program is a catalyst for national industrial growth, extending beyond defense. It fosters advancements in materials science, AI, and manufacturing, creating vital spillovers for civilian sectors like automotive and renewable energy. This initiative strengthens India's technological ecosystem and workforce, positioning it as a global aerospace supplier.

title: 'I love it when Virat says ... ': Botham in awe of icon's passion for Test cricket
content: Even after retiring from Test cricket in May 2025, Virat Kohli continues to express his deep love for the format, stating it ranks far above his recent IPL title win.  England legend Ian Botham lauded Kohli's mindset, calling his commitment to Test cricket the defining aspect of his greatness.

title: Gold, silver price prediction: Where are metal rates headed in near future?
content: Gold and silver price prediction today: MCX Gold is showing a bearish bias and MCX Silver is consolidating this week, according to Abhilash Koikkara, Head - Forex & Commodities, Nuvama Professional Clients Group.

title: Workload (mis) management: Why IPL franchises need to do better
content: IPL's final league day exposed poor workload management as Jasprit Bumrah and Varun Chakravarthy played with injuries. Despite knowing about Bumrah's knee niggle, Mumbai Indians fielded him extensively. Ajinkya Rahane admitted Varun played with a hairline fracture after medical team clearance. Rajasthan Royals' Riyan Parag also revealed fitness issues, highlighting a concerning trend for Indian cricketers ahead of future assignments.

title: Fuel price hike and OMC profits: Are India’s oil firms really making windfall gains?
content: Recent fuel price hikes have ignited debate over oil marketing companies' (OMCs) profits amid the Middle East crisis. Despite a reported Rs 77,821 crore profit for FY26, a closer look reveals thin margins, past losses, and a lag in reflecting current crude price impacts.  These profits are crucial for investments and national energy security.

title: Horrific crash, setbacks and the wait: Bharti struggles, but keeps India dream alive
content: ​Footballer Abneet Bharti, currently with Academia del Balompie Boliviano, suffered a career setback after a cycling accident in Bolivia left him injured and unable to play. Bharti’s dream of representing India has already been hindered by bureaucratic challenges, but he remains determined to earn his first cap despite ongoing obstacles.

title: 42 grooms for 0 brides: Mass wedding con in MP leaves baraatis high & dry
content: Dozens of families in Madhya Pradesh were defrauded in a bizarre marriage scam. Grooms arrived for a mass wedding, only to discover the promised brides, allegedly from an Indore orphanage, were non-existent. Organizers collected thousands from families, using social media photos as 'brides.' Police arrested some accused, with investigations ongoing to recover the Rs 1.76 lakh collected.

title: Eye on China, Pakistan: India plans major battlefield upgrade for ageing T-72 tanks
content: India's T-72 tanks, once cutting-edge, are undergoing a significant upgrade under Project Rhino, receiving new engines and advanced fire-control systems. This modernization aims to extend their service life beyond 2030. Meanwhile, the Indian Army has inducted its 1,000th T-90 tank, a successor based on the T-72 platform, bolstering its armored capabilities.

title: Consumer court orders Rs 50k compensation as Ola driver takes her 25 km in wrong directio
content: A consumer commission in Andhra Pradesh has ordered Ola to pay Rs 50,000 in compensation to a woman passenger. She was left stranded on a highway by a driver while en route to a crucial judicial exam. The commission ruled Ola is liable for the driver's misconduct, emphasizing the company's duty of care to consumers using its platform.

title: Watch: Hinge's aggression after dismissing Sooryavanshi doesn't sit well with fans
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s explosive 97 off 29 balls against SRH became the highlight of the IPL 2026 Eliminator. Fans criticised SRH pacer Praful Hinge’s aggressive celebration after dismissing the 15-year-old batter, while Abhishek Sharma’s supportive gesture towards Vaibhav earned praise online. Sooryavanshi’s innings, featuring 12 sixes, powered Rajasthan Royals to 243/8 and helped them dominate the knockout clash.

title: 50 seconds of terror: Lucknow property dealer shot point blank in broad daylight
content: A 35-year-old property dealer, Sandeep Singh, was brutally shot dead in a busy Lucknow market. CCTV footage shows two bikeborne assailants firing repeatedly at close range, even after the victim collapsed. The attackers, with a faulty number plate, fled the scene. Police are investigating the planned execution.

title: Shampoo, sacks and more: How is Middle East conflict making your groceries costlier?
content: Your daily essentials, from shampoo to biscuits, are set to become pricier.  A global conflict is driving up raw material costs, forcing companies to hike prices by 3-7% and potentially reduce product sizes.  Expect further increases in food, beverage, and personal care items as businesses grapple with soaring input expenses.

title: Sooryavanshi 'doesn't give a damn about any bowler': Jurel reveals mantra
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 97 off 29 balls powered Rajasthan Royals to a 47-run victory over Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teammate Dhruv Jurel revealed the 15-year-old's fearless approach, emphasizing his focus solely on the ball, not the bowler. This win propels RR closer to the IPL title.

title: CBSE exam discrepancy claims: Pradhan issues clarification, takes swipe at Rahul
content: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan addressed concerns over CBSE Class 12 evaluation discrepancies, assuring no one would be spared if irregularities are found. He criticized Rahul Gandhi's frustration over electoral defeats, accusing him of opposing India's scientific progress. Pradhan emphasized the government's commitment to student well-being and transparency in the digital evaluation system.

title: Ashwin fumes at SRH collapse, asks 'management to think' Head’s future
content: R Ashwin lambasted Sunrisers Hyderabad's reckless batting in their IPL Eliminator loss, particularly criticizing Ishan Kishan's unnecessary shot and Travis Head's overall season. Ashwin suggested SRH management must re-evaluate Head's future, stating a lack of game awareness cost them a winnable chase against Rajasthan Royals.

title: 'Verbal abuse, misogyny': Former TMC MP Kakoli writes to Om Birla against Kalyan Banerjee
content: Trinamool Congress MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar has lodged a formal complaint with Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla against party MP Kalyan Banerjee, accusing him of repeated verbal abuse within Parliament. This complaint follows Dastidar's recent resignations from key party posts and public criticism of the TMC's leadership and political consultancy firm I-PAC after the party's electoral performance.

title: Djokovic hits out at Paris crowd: 'Won't play any more French players'
content: After conquering French talent Valentin Royer in a challenging four-set encounter, Novak Djokovic voiced his discontent with the Ville de Paris crowd, who booed him during the match. He revealed a desire to steer clear of facing any more French competitors after also besting one in the first round at Roland Garros.

title: Dark seas, floating drug bags, foreign smugglers: Inside Gujarat’s biggest cocaine bust
content: Gujarat ATS and Coast Guard seized 115kg of cocaine worth Rs 1,150 crore from a cargo vessel near Mundra port, a major maritime anti-narcotics operation. Three foreign nationals were arrested, while one Tanzanian national is feared drowned after jumping into the sea. The drugs originated in Brazil and were destined for Delhi.

title: Watch: Kavya Maran greets Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after SRH exit IPL 2026
content: Kavya Maran’s post-match greeting for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral after Rajasthan Royals defeated Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. The 15-year-old smashed 97 off 29 balls with 12 sixes, helping RR post 243/8. Jofra Archer starred with the ball as SRH were bowled out for 196. Rajasthan Royals now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 2.

title: Man posted image of dog sitting on Indian flag; Allahabad HC grants bail — here’s why
content: The Allahabad High Court made headlines by granting bail to a man accused of an unsettling social media post featuring the Indian flag alongside a dog. The judges remarked on the unreasonably lengthy delays in his trial process and argued that holding someone without conviction is counterintuitive to justice.

title: Where do you bowl to Sooryavanshi? Archer’s hilarious reply goes viral
content: Jofra Archer humorously dodged questions about his bowling strategy against teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi following Rajasthan Royals' dominant IPL Eliminator win. Sooryavanshi's explosive 97 off 29 balls powered RR to 243/8, while Archer's devastating spell dismantled SRH's chase, securing a 47-run victory.

title: ‘God’ in contact list: CBI uncovers chilling WhatsApp trail in NEET-UG leak probe
content: In a notable crackdown, the Central Bureau of Investigation detained a paediatrician from Latur and a physics teacher from Pune linked to the NEET-UG 2026 examination leak. This surge in arrests now totals 13 individuals. Investigators revealed a web of WhatsApp communications and financial exchanges indicating that the leaked physics questions were sold to affluent families for substantial payments.

title: Honey Singh reveals he wears a wig, as heavy medication made him bald
content: In a candid revelation, Yo Yo Honey Singh shares his tumultuous experience with bipolar disorder, which resulted in total hair loss due to extensive medication, leading him to don a wig. He recounts a seven-year phase of seclusion, distancing himself from the public eye after a notable incident. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Weather Today LIVE: Strong Dust Storm, Rains Likely In Delhi Shortly, Says Weatherman
content: Weather Updates Today, Heatwave, IMD Alert LIVE Updates: Light to very light rain is expected during the afternoon and evening, accompanied by strong winds and squalls reaching speeds of 50-60 kmph.

title: 6, Including 2 Minors, Detained For Robbing, Assaulting Man In Delhi
content: A 26-year-old "missing" woman from Burhanpur district in Madhya Pradesh, whose father and brother were arrested by Maharashtra police on charges of "murdering" her, has been found alive, an official said on Thursday.

title: "No Interest In National Politics": Siddaramaiah Declines Rajya Sabha Offer
content: "The high command told me to 'Go Rajya Sabha' but I have said 'no' to it. I have no interest in national politics. I will be in active politics," said Siddarmaiah

title: India To Build 14 Schools In Earthquake-Affected Districts Of Nepal
content: India has pledged Nepali Rupees 560.2 million for the construction of 14 schools in eight earthquake-affected districts of Nepal, reaffirming its commitment to the Himalayan nation's post-disaster reconstruction and socio-economic development.

title: Inside Track: Backroom Meetings That Led To Siddaramaiah's Resignation
content: Once Siddaramaiah realised that the Congress High Command had already made up its mind, he gave his consent to step down, the surces said.

title: Amit Shah Pays Tribute To Savarkar On Birth Anniversary, Announces New Panel
content: Amit Shah on Tuesday paid tribute to Vinayak Damodar Savarkar on his birth anniversary, describing him as a freedom fighter whose contribution to the country did not require official recognition and whose legacy lives on in public memory as "Veer Sav

title: Siddaramaiah's Answer To NDTV On Who's The Next Karnataka Chief Minister
content: "I have always said, both inside and outside the assembly, that whenever the high command directs me, I will give my resignation," Siddaramaiah said

title: AAP Local Leader Shot At In Amritsar, Admitted To Hospital
content: The politician has been identified as Jaipal Singh Bau, who is in charge of the party's Ward Number 42.

title: "Never Ever": North Korea Rejects Denuclearisation Push By Quad Nations
content: North Korea on Thursday condemned the joint statement issued by the Quad nations calling for Pyongyang's complete denuclearisation, reiterating that it will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, according to South Korean news agency Yonhap.

title: NDTV Ground Report From Israel's Most Active Conflict Zone Near Lebanon Border
content: NDTV reports from Tefen, one of the most sensitive conflict zones along Israel's northern front, where Hezbollah attacks continue to keep both civilians and security forces under pressure.

title: US Hunger Crisis Worsens Beyond Covid Years: New York Fed
content: More Americans are suffering from hunger this year than during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York said Wednesday.

title: Karnataka Politics Live Updates: Declined Rajya Sabha Seat Offer, Says Siddaramaiah
content: Karnataka Politics Live Updates: A change in leadership in the three-year-old Karnataka government appears imminent, with Siddaramaiah having sought an appointment with Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot, reportedly to tender his resignation.

title: Iran War LIVE Updates: US, Iran Trade Strikes After Trump's 'Negotiating On Fumes' Warning
content: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

title: Students Share Views On Live-In, Polygamy In Assam Uniform Civil Code
content: While many students welcomed the ban on polygamy, several also expressed concern that regulations surrounding live-in relationships could restrict personal freedom.

title: Parking Zone To Hospital In 7 Hours: Inside Underground Health Camp In Israel
content: The hospital was designed after the 2006 Lebanon war exposed the vulnerability of northern Israel's medical infrastructure.

title: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Highlights: Vijay's Meeting With Rahul, Sonia Gandhi Postponed
content: Vijay Delhi Visit Live Updates: Vijay assumed office as Chief Minister on May 10 after his party emerged as the single largest party in the Assembly elections. TVK had won 108 seats in the 234-member Assembly

title: Karnataka Techie, 43, Killed By Lightning While Visiting Farmland With Family
content: Roshan had gone to Mysuru to inspect a piece of land related to his agricultural plans. He was accompanied by his wife and son at the time of the visit.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Siddaramaiah: The Man Who Has Never Believed In Bowing Out Quietly
content: Old habits die hard. Siddaramaiah is a grassroots socialist, an anarchist who has always thrived in chaos. Don't expect him to retire to a life of an elderly statesman - not yet, at least.
